title: Your next car may be electric
content_html:
Your next car may be electric

Source: Tim Thwaites, Cosmos magazine.

The main reasons why electric cars are not more popular at present are their price and their relatively small range. Existing battery systems only allow electric cars to travel a distance of between 100 and 160 km. However, this distance may not be a problem for urban drivers. A recent Sydney study reported that 70 percent of journeys were 30 km or less, and recent data from the US suggests that 77 percent of trips taken there are 48 km or less.

An innovative company called Better Place is aiming to make electric cars an option for all drivers. It wants to see existing vehicles replaced by electric vehicles which, it says, offer a number of benefits. Firstly, they can be powered by renewable energy which produces zero emissions. What is more, electric motors are more efficient and can convert more than 90 percent of power into movement, whereas the efficiency of diesel or petrol engines is less than 20 percent.

The plan is simple but revolutionary. It starts with the installation of a home charge point, and through this, the vehicle will be plugged into the electricity grid whenever it is in the garage, typically at night. In the morning, with a fully charged battery, the car is capable of as much as 160 km in urban motoring conditions. In addition to the home charge point, the battery can be topped up by charge points at work and at supermarkets.

The battery is linked to a control centre by smart technology inside the vehicle. Better Place can then ensure that the car is charged with electricity from renewable sources at the cheapest price. For longer trips, a navigation system directs the driver to the nearest switch station, where the depleted battery can be replaced with a charged one by a robot within a couple of minutes.

(No comprehension questions set for this passage — reading only.)

questions.text: Car connects to 1 ______ through home charge point.
questions.question: Car connects to 1 ______ through home charge point.
questions.groupHtml:
Questions 1–6

Complete the notes below.

Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER from the passage for each answer.
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword

connects to
home charge point

Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

"the vehicle will be plugged into the electricity grid whenever it is in the garage"

Bước 3: Phân tích

plugged into = connects to
electricity grid = nơi chiếc xe được kết nối thông qua home charge point

Đáp án: electricity grid

_blockConfig.wordLimit: NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER
_blockConfig.noteContent:
• Car connects to [1] through home charge point.
 • Battery allows travel of up to [2] in cities.
 • Battery can be recharged at [3] or shops.
 • Car communicates with control centre to receive power lowest [4] 
 • [5] inside car locates switch stations.
 • [6] at switch centre will change batteries.

questions.questionHtml:
• Car connects to 1_______ through home charge point.
  • Battery allows travel of up to 2_______ in cities.
  • Battery can be recharged at 3_______ or shops.
  • Car communicates with control centre to receive power lowest 4_______
  • 5_______ inside car locates switch stations.
  • 6_______ at switch centre will change batteries.

questions.text: Battery allows travel of up to 2 ______ in cities.
questions.question: Battery allows travel of up to 2 ______ in cities.
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword

travel of up to
cities

Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

"the car is capable of as much as 160 km in urban motoring conditions"

Bước 3: Phân tích

as much as = up to
urban = cities

Đáp án: 160 km

questions.text: Battery can be recharged at 3 ................ or shops.
questions.question: Battery can be recharged at 3 ................ or shops.
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword

recharged
shops

Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

"the battery can be topped up by charge points at work and at supermarkets"

Bước 3: Phân tích

topped up = recharged
supermarkets = shops
work là địa điểm còn thiếu

Đáp án: work

questions.text: Car communicates with control centre to receive power lowest 4 ................
questions.question: Car communicates with control centre to receive power lowest 4 ................
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword

control centre
lowest

Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

"the car is charged with electricity from renewable sources at the cheapest price"

Bước 3: Phân tích

cheapest = lowest
charged with electricity = receive power

Đáp án: price

questions.question: 5 ................ inside car locates switch stations.
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword

inside car
switch stations

Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

"a navigation system directs the driver to the nearest switch station"

Bước 3: Phân tích

navigation system = hệ thống bên trong xe
directs the driver to = locates
Đáp án: navigation system

questions.text: 6 ................ at switch centre will change batteries.
questions.question: 6 ................ at switch centre will change batteries.
questions.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword

switch centre
change batteries

Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

"the depleted battery can be replaced with a charged one by a robot"

Bước 3: Phân tích

replaced = changed
by a robot = robot thực hiện việc thay pin

Đáp án: robot
